title: Better Ghast x Fresh Animations
description: Re-Textured Ghast and Happy Ghast But with Fresh animation support!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b4a7e8b2e59bb8d64b179561d76eb3e7ebaea8.png) #
#
### **Description** If you like my other pack: **https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-ghast** and you use **Fresh Animations** then this pack is perfect for you! This pack makes Happy Ghast and Ghast look way better and fresher, with new textures! This Resource pack also works with my Fresh Animation 3D Harness Resource Pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-harnesses-x-fresh-animations #
### **IMPORTANT!!!** When using both packs **make sure the the harness pack is above the ghast pack** ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3772bbf2500e2e061be0152a59825ada4e525e53.png)
# ### **Requirements**
